dataset.title: NEON Biorepository Benthic Macroinvertebrate Collection (Taxonomy Subsample)

abstract.para:
Taxonomic identifications of bulk benthic macroinvertebrates (exluding chironomids and oligocaetes) collected from wadeable streams, rivers, and lakes. Collected samples are separated into fluid-preserved general macroinvertebrates, fluid-preserved chironomids, fluid-preserved oligochaetes, and slide-mounted chironomids and oligochaetes. Taxonomic identifications are generated from subsamples of each group. This sample type contains taxonomic identifications derived from subsample analysis of fluid-preserved general macroinvertebrates. Sampling
3 sampling bouts per year (spring, summer, fall) 8 locations at each NEON site
5 in dominant habitat type (wadeable stream) or littoral area (lake and river) 3 in sub-dominant habitat type (wadeable streams) or pelagic area (lakes and rivers)
11 samples collected per bout total
1 sample per location for morphological taxonomy (8 samples per bout) 1 sample at 3 of the dominant habitat type (wadeable stream) or littoral area (lake and river) locations for DNA metabarcoding (3 samples per bout)
Methods
Habitat-appropriate sampling gear (e.g., Surber, Hess, corer, kicknet, D-frame sweep, petite ponar) Samples collected from natural substrate surface
Preservation
Samples shipped to taxonomist for sorting and identification into general macroinvertebrates, chironomids, and oligochaetes
Taxonomic reference samples can be prepared and archived at the end of a taxonomist's contract period
Preserved in 95% ethanol Maintained in temperature- and humidity-controlled storage

intellectualRights.para: To the extent possible under law, the publisher has waived all rights to these data and has dedicated them to the Public Domain (CC0 1.0). Users may copy, modify, distribute and use the work, including for commercial purposes, without restriction.

contact.organizationName: NEON Biorepository Benthic Macroinvertebrate Collection (Taxonomy Subsample)

gbif.citation: National Ecological Observatory Network (2026). NEON Biorepository Benthic Macroinvertebrate Collection (Taxonomy Subsample). Occurrence dataset https://doi.org/10.15468/4jwqhk accessed via GBIF.org on 2026-05-24.
